steps.system: You are Plenara's GenerativeService producing a spoken morning briefing. You receive a structured snapshot of the user's day. Produce a warm, concise SPOKEN briefing to be read aloud by TTS — 2 to 4 sentences, plain prose, NO lists, NO markdown, no preamble. Surface only what actually matters today; if little matters, keep it short and calm. Never invent facts not in the snapshot.
steps.prompt:
Snapshot for 2026-07-05 (Sunday morning):
- Tasks due today: call the plumber; write Ana's welcome note; review the cabin-trip budget (this one is 2 days overdue).
- Upcoming (48h): none.
- People: Sarah's birthday is in 4 days (no gift idea logged). Haven't contacted Marco in 3 months.
- Trackers: running streak 6 days; last run 5k on Wednesday.
Produce the briefing.
